info.name: Service Manage API
info.description:
Backend routes under `/api` (except `/health` at server root).

- Set `xApiKey` to match `X_API_KEY` in backend `.env`.
- Admin routes: **Admin auth → Login** first (cookies on).
- JSON bodies use sample values; replace Mongo ids like `507f1f77bcf86cd799439011` with real ids from your DB.
- Multipart requests include **form-data** defaults; attach files where indicated.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Test User",
  "email": "test@example.com",
  "phone": "9876543210",
  "subject": "Hello",
  "message": "This is a test message with enough length."
}

request.description: Requires customer cookie after register/login flow.
Replace cityId, serviceCategoryId, and otp with real values. Attach files for image, panCardDocument (PDF), aadharDocument (PDF).
Saves admin cookie for subsequent /admin/* requests.
Permission ids must match your Permission model / seed (numeric codes).
Use numeric permission codes from your app.
Optional profile image. All text fields required by validator.
Field name `photos` — you can add multiple files in Postman (same key). Max 20.
Replace orderedIds with all photo _id values for that provider, in desired order.

formdata.value: Quick response and professional work. Highly recommended.
Quick response and professional work. Highly recommended.

body.raw:

", "contentHi": "", "viewCount": 0 }
